base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of gear_animation_clock_tower — a effect_layer from 1986 castlevania. used as moving-platform and background decoration in Clock Tower. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4-frame rotating cog-gear — used as moving-platform and background decoration in Clock Tower; rotates continuously
